steps.title: Build the confidence interval
steps.content:
A margin of error specifies the plausible range around a point estimate. The interval extends from the estimate minus the margin to the estimate plus the margin:
$$14\% - 2.75\% = 11.25\% \quad \text{(lower bound)}$$
$$14\% + 2.75\% = 16.75\% \quad \text{(upper bound)}$$

steps.title: Identify the correct conclusion
steps.content: The confidence interval [11.25%, 16.75%] represents all values that are plausible for the true defect percentage based on the sample and margin of error. This is exactly what the correct answer states. That confirms B is correct.
